MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Casa De La Raza, Inc. is present. Represented by Sheley Quimbo.
Attorney, Brenda Cruz Keith is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Sandra James is present.
Attorney, Melvin C. Belli is representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Neil Bardack, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of December 02, 2013 remains on calendar.
